Title: User Registration with Valid Credentials
Test Data:
- Email: test@example.com
- Password: Test123
Test Steps:
1. User enters email and password into the UI.
2. UI sends the data to Firebase/Authentication.
3. Firebase/Authentication validates the data.
4. Firebase/Authentication retrieves user data from Firestore.
5. Firebase/Authentication returns a token to the UI.
6. UI saves the user in the system.
7. UI confirms the save operation.
Expected Result: User account is successfully created and saved in the system.

Title: User Registration with Invalid Credentials
Test Data:
- Email: test@example.com
- Password: InvalidPassword
Test Steps:
1. User enters email and password into the UI.
2. UI sends the data to Firebase/Authentication.
3. Firebase/Authentication validates the data.
4. Firebase/Authentication returns an error message to the UI.
5. UI displays an error message to the user.
Expected Result: User account creation fails due to invalid credentials.

Title: User Login with Valid Credentials
Test Data:
- Email: test@example.com
- Password: Test123
Test Steps:
1. User enters email and password into the UI.
2. UI sends the data to FirebaseAuthentication.
3. FirebaseAuthentication validates the credentials.
4. FirebaseAuthentication retrieves user data from Firestore.
5. FirebaseAuthentication returns a token to the UI.
6. UI displays a success message to the user.
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully.
